targets.notes: COMPLETE. All 11 theorems proved, no sorry. vote_result, majority, yesCount, missingCount, quorum_intersection all formally verified.

PR #14 open. committedIndex_monotone FULLY PROVED. Remaining sorry: committedIndex_safety and committedIndex_maximal - blocker is Finset.card_filter <-> List.countP bridge. Need exact Mathlib 4.14.0 lemma names: List.Perm.countP_eq, List.countP_map, Finset.card_filter (Multiset.countP form), Multiset.countP_coe.
PR #14 open. Basic theorems proved. Budget/maximality theorems still sorry. T3 requires precondition: sizes[0] > 0. T4: when stop condition met, result.sum + next > lim.

NEW THIS RUN. Informal spec + Lean spec written. Types: Entry, SnapMeta, Unstable. Invariants: indexCoherent (INV-1), snapCoherent (INV-2), wellFormed. All 6 methods modelled. 20 decide examples. 15 theorems fully proved. 3 sorry theorems remain: slice_indices, maybeTerm_last (entries branch), truncateAndAppend_caseA_coherent. All blocked on exact Lean 4 Mathlib 4.14.0 API names for List.get_drop, List.get?_eq_get, List.get_append.

next_steps: Task5: Fix unstable_log sorry theorems: List.get_drop (for slice_indices), List.get?_eq_get (for maybeTerm_last), List.get_append_left/right (for truncateAndAppend_caseA_coherent).
Task5: Fix committedIndex_safety and committedIndex_maximal by completing the Finset.card_filter -> List.countP bridge.
Task5: Fix limitSize_sum_le (T3) and limitSize_maximal (T4) by induction on limitSizeGo.
Task3/4: Consider writing Lean spec for Inflights ring buffer (phase 1->3). Key invariants: start+count <= cap, circular addressing.
